name: America Movil
message: América Móvil, S.A.B. de C.V. ("América Móvil" or "the Company") stands as one of the foremost telecommunications conglomerates globally, with its roots firmly planted in Mexico. Established in 2000, it emerged from the wireless operations spun off by Teléfonos de México, S.A.B. de C.V. ("Telmex"), a pivotal moment that marked its inception into the competitive telecommunications landscape.
